description: Public API surface policy for canonical components, compatibility aliases, and domain specializations.

compatibilityAliases.name: Sidebar
compatibilityAliases.reason: Legacy short shell name retained for old stories/consumers. New CRM/Internal pages should use CrmProductShell and shell slots, or CrmShellSidebar when a direct shell part is required.

compatibilityAliases.name: Topbar
compatibilityAliases.reason: Legacy short topbar name retained for compatibility. New page navigation should be provided through CrmProductShell/top-nav props or CrmShellTopNav.

compatibilityAliases.name: GlobalActions
compatibilityAliases.reason: Legacy short action-cluster name retained for compatibility. New shell work should use CrmShellGlobalActions or CrmProductShell global-action props.

compatibilityAliases.name: TaskQueueList
compatibilityAliases.reason: Historical image-23 crop component. New work-list rails must use PageQuickFilters with page-specific items.

compatibilityAliases.name: ActionMenu
compatibilityAliases.reason: Semantic alias for action-trigger menus. DropdownMenu owns the primitive implementation.

domainSpecializations.name: PageFilterBar
domainSpecializations.reason: CRM page composition with default search, filters, actions, density, and overflow behavior.

domainSpecializations.name: PageQuickFilters
domainSpecializations.reason: CRM quick-filter rail with heading, count grammar, selected state, empty/loading/blocked states, and page rail layout.

domainSpecializations.name: MetricCard
domainSpecializations.reason: Product metric surface with CRM copy density and action context.

domainSpecializations.name: StatusCard
domainSpecializations.reason: CRM operational status card composed from product status semantics.

domainSpecializations.name: TaskTable
domainSpecializations.reason: Task-specific prepared-row table with official task columns, sort affordances, row state, and footer.

domainSpecializations.name: LeadTable
domainSpecializations.reason: Lead-specific prepared-row table for consumer pages.

domainSpecializations.name: ChecklistTable
domainSpecializations.reason: Checklist-specific prepared-row table with checklist progress and selected-row grammar.

domainSpecializations.name: ApprovalTable
domainSpecializations.reason: Approval-specific prepared-row table for human decision queues.

domainSpecializations.name: StudentTable
domainSpecializations.reason: Student-specific prepared-row table for student list/profile entry points.

domainSpecializations.name: ReplacementTable
domainSpecializations.reason: Replacement-specific prepared-row table for reposicao workflows.

domainSpecializations.name: CrmRecordDrawer
domainSpecializations.reason: Generic CRM record drawer wrapper for consumers that need one official drawer anatomy with dynamic sections/actions.
